word: G1750 - ἐνειλέω - eneiléō - en-i-leh'-o - Wrap in

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐνειλέω

- Transliteration: Eneileo

- Phonetic: en-i-leh'-o

- Definition:

1. to roll in, wind up

- Origin: from G1772 and the base of G1507

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1722 and the base of G1507; to enwrap: - wrap in.
